responses.vehicle_wont_retrieve: Please contact the parking attendant for assistance. If the attendant is unavailable, the Front Desk will be happy to help.
responses.aps_down: Please contact the parking attendant for assistance.
responses.bay_not_working: Please contact the parking attendant for assistance.
responses.vehicle_too_large: Please contact the parking attendant for assistance.
responses.lost_parking_credential: Please contact Management at admin@brickellhouse.net for a replacement. The replacement fee is $55.

rules: Vehicles should not be left unattended in the retrieval bay.
Residents should not request a vehicle and return upstairs before moving it.
Guests and visitors may valet their car.
Overnight guest parking is allowed through valet.
Vehicle washing and vehicle repairs are not permitted.
examples_es: Mi carro no baja del garaje.
response_es: Responde en español y dirige asuntos de APS, valet o garaje al encargado de estacionamiento o al Front Desk según corresponda.
